title: Bingo
brief: A distant station, a thin tank. Command a sustainable cruise — too fast and FA refuses on endurance; too slow and you flame out before you arrive. Watch the fuel on NavigationReportMT.
teaches: FA validates a command against endurance, not just the envelope: a speed that would burn the reserve too fast is rejected VIOLATION_ENDURANCE. Faster also means fewer ticks aloft, so the win is a sustainable cruise read off the fuel reports — not max throttle.

objective._doc: reach-hold at a far station (-2600,0) @ 3000 m. The Heron launches hot (speed 50) on a thin tank (start.fuel 420): hold max throttle and you flame out well short, so the player must SLOW to the fuel-flow minimum (~35) to make the range. Commanding max throttle is also rejected VIOLATION_ENDURANCE.
